title: onosma longiloba
intro: Onosma longiloba, also known as Onosma longiloba, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine, particularly in Ayurveda and Chinese medicine, for its various medicinal properties. Onosma longiloba is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
